# Soft-wrapped secrets: a single token a human (or a terminal) hard-wrapped
# across one newline. No single pattern spans the break; the conservative
# soft-wrap pass joins only newlines sitting strictly between secret-body
# characters, so each of these must still be detected and round-trip clean.
# All values are synthetic.

# === AWS access key wrapped mid-token ===
# expect: AWS Access Key ID
AKIAIOSFOD
NN7EXAMPLE

# === GitHub PAT wrapped mid-token ===
# expect: GitHub Personal Access Token
ghp_AAAAAAAAAAAA
BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB

# === Slack bot token wrapped mid-token ===
# expect: Slack Bot Token
xoxb-1234567890
ABCDEFGHIJ
